title: festuca rubra subsp. yvesiana
intro: Festuca rubra subsp. yvesiana is a subspecies of the red fescue plant, characterized by its compact growth habit and fine, blue-green foliage. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Festuca rubra subsp. yvesiana are attributed to its ability to soothe and calm the body, potentially alleviating symptoms of anxiety and stress, as well as promoting a restful night's sleep. The herbal preparations of this plant can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote relaxation and reduce inflammation.
